case_title: IN RE: MARCIA SANCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER MARCIA SANCHEZ, ALFRED RANDOLPH'S PETITION FOR ORDER AUTHORIZING PRE-FILING DISCOVERY PER CCP 2035.010. IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PARTIES STIPULATED TO HAVE MATTER DECIDED BY JUDGE PRO TEM. MARK SCHREIBER JUDGE PRO TEM, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition In Support Of Verified Petitio For Order Authorizing Pre-Filing Discovery Per Ccp 2035.010 Et Seq
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS MARCIA SANCHEZ and ALFRED RANDOLPH'S Petition In Support Of Verified Petition For Order Authorizing Pre-Filing Discovery Per CCP 2035.010 Et. Seq. is to be heard on the Discovery Calendar at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Petitioner Marcia Sanchez, Alfred Randolph Petitio For Order Authorizing Pre-Filing Discovery Per Ccp 2035.010 Et Seq
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty.S. Clinton Woods of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. (415-433-4800) appearing for petitioner.
Atty. Sonia C. merida of Law Offices of Santana & Hart, (415-777-1308) appearing for respondent.
Argued - Petitioner Marcia Sanchez, Alfred Randolph's Petition For Order Authorizing Pre-Filing Discovery Per Ccp 2035.010. is granted. Order signed in open court. Parties stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Mark Schreiber Judge Pro Tem, not reported.=(302/JPT)
